# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

# values.yaml
replicaCount: 1

image:
  repository: <your-repo>
  tag: latest
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent

service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 80

ingress:
  enabled: true
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /
  hosts:
    - host: example.com
      paths:
        - path: /
          pathType: Prefix

deployment:
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: <your-app>

resources:
  requests:
    cpu: 100m
    memory: 128Mi
  limits:
    cpu: 200m
    memory: 256Mi

# deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.deployment.name }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.deployment.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.deployment.name }}
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Values.deployment.name }}
        image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
        imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
# service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.service.name }}
spec:
  selector:
    app: {{ .Values.deployment.name }}
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 80
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}

---
# ingress.yaml
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.ingress.name }}
spec:
  rules:
  - host: example.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: {{ .Values.service.name }}
            port:
              number: 80

---
# ingress-nginx.yaml
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: IngressClass
metadata:
  name: nginx
spec:
  controller: k8s.io/ingress-nginx/nginx-ingress-controller
